title: TDN (TouchDesigner Network)
description: JSON schema for TDN v1.0 — a human-readable format for representing TouchDesigner operator networks.

build.description: Embody build number for the exported COMP. null if no build tracking.

network_path.description: The COMP path represented by this file (e.g., "/" for the entire project).

include_dat_content.description: Whether DAT text/table content was included in the export.

export_mode.description: Present in per-COMP export mode. Indicates this file is part of a split export.

parameters.description: Parameter values shared unanimously by all operators of this type.

flags.description: Flags shared unanimously by all operators of this type.

size.description: Node tile size [width, height] shared unanimously by all operators of this type.

color.description: Node color [r, g, b] shared unanimously by all operators of this type.

tags.description: Operator tags shared unanimously by all operators of this type.

type_defaults.description: Per-type shared properties (parameters, flags, size, color, tags). Only types with 2+ operators and unanimous values are included.

additionalProperties.description: Array of parameter definitions (without values) for this template.

par_templates.description: Reusable custom parameter page definitions. Referenced by $t in operator custom_pars.

parameterValue.description: A parameter value: constant (string, number, boolean), expression ('=...'), bind ('~...'), or legacy dict format.

expr.description: Legacy format: Python expression evaluated by TouchDesigner each frame.

bind.description: Legacy format: Bind expression referencing another parameter.

connectionArray.description: Array of source operator references. Position equals input index. null for empty slots.

oneOf.description: Source operator — sibling name or full path.

source.description: Source operator — sibling name or full path.

flagsArray.description: Array of flag name strings. Names without prefix set the flag to true; names with '-' prefix set to false.

legacyFlags.description: Legacy format: flags as object with boolean values.

customParameterDef.description: Definition of a custom parameter (structure, range, etc.). Used in par_templates and inline page arrays.

name.description: Base name of the parameter (without component suffix).

label.description: Display label. Omitted when it matches the name.

size.description: Number of components for multi-component Float/Int parameters.

default.description: Default value. Omitted when it equals a standard default (0, 0.0, "", or false).

clampMin.description: Whether the value is clamped to min.

clampMax.description: Whether the value is clamped to max.

menuNames.description: Internal names for each menu option.

menuLabels.description: Display labels for each menu option.

menuSource.description: DAT path or expression that dynamically populates the menu.

startSection.description: Whether this parameter starts a new visual section.

templateReference.description: Reference to a par_template with value overrides. $t names the template; other keys are parameter name to value overrides.

$t.description: Template name (matches a key in par_templates).

customParsPageGrouped.description: Custom parameters grouped by page name. Each page is either an array of parameter definitions or a template reference.

oneOf.description: Inline parameter definitions for this page.

operator.description: A TouchDesigner operator with its non-default properties.

position.description: Node tile position [x, y]. Omitted when [0, 0] (default).

color.description: Node color [r, g, b] as floats 0.0-1.0. Default: [0.545, 0.545, 0.545].

parameters.description: Non-default built-in parameter values. Expressions use '=' prefix, binds use '~' prefix.

oneOf.description: Legacy format: flat array of custom parameter definitions with 'page' field.

custom_pars.description: Custom parameter definitions (COMPs only). Preferred format: page-grouped object.

flags.description: Operator flags. Preferred format: string array. Legacy format: object with boolean values.

inputs.description: Operator-level input connections. Preferred format: string array. Legacy format: object array.

comp_inputs.description: COMP-level input connections. Preferred format: string array. Legacy format: object array.

dat_content.description: DAT text (string) or table data (array of row arrays). DATs only.

dat_content_format.description: Format of dat_content. Present whenever dat_content is present.

children.description: Child operators (COMPs only, excluding palette clones).

palette_clone.description: true if this COMP is cloned from the TD palette (/sys/). Children are not exported.

tdn_ref.description: In per-COMP export mode, path to a separate .tdn file containing children.
